title: Data Strategy, Operating Model & Reference Architecture
description: Business outcomes, maturity model, domains, data products, ownership, platform principles

lessons.title: Why Data Strategy Matters
lessons.description: Business outcomes of intentional data architecture vs accidental complexity; the cost of no strategy

lessons.title: Data Domains, Ownership & Data Products
lessons.description: Domain-driven data design; centralized, federated, and hybrid ownership models; AI data ownership

lessons.title: Maturity Model & Assessment
lessons.description: Assessing current state across data management, platform capabilities, governance, and AI readiness

lessons.title: Reference Architecture Patterns
lessons.description: Three reference-architecture archetypes: managed-cloud-first, Kubernetes-centric, and hybrid/regulated enterprise

lessons.title: Building Your Data Strategy Roadmap
lessons.description: Hands-on: translating assessment to a prioritized roadmap with capability gaps, owners, and success metrics
